## Examples

Just create an issue if you want your example here.

[seventure](sevenlemons.pages.dev)

## Quickstart

1. Click "Code" and download the ZIP file. Then, extract it.

2. **Drop your avatar** into the `assets/` folder as `avatar.png`  
   (or point `avatar` in config.js to any image URL)

3. **Edit `config.js`** — all customization lives there:
   - `username`, `uid`, `bio`
   - `badges` — emoji + label pairs
   - `socials` — Font Awesome icon class, label, and URL
   - `accentPrimary` / `accentSecondary` — theme colours (hex)
   - `viewBase` — starting view count

4. **Open `index.html`** in any browser, or upload all files to any static host
   (GitHub Pages, Netlify, Vercel, Cloudflare Pages, etc.)

## Font Awesome icon reference

Find icon class names at <https://fontawesome.com/search>  
Examples: `fab fa-youtube`, `fab fa-twitter`, `fab fa-twitch`,  
`fab fa-github`, `fab fa-instagram`, `fas fa-link`, `fas fa-envelope`

## File structure

```
index.html    ← page structure
style.css     ← all visual styles
script.js     ← splash, particles, view counter
config.js     ← YOUR customization (edit this!)
assets/
  avatar.png  ← put your profile picture here
README.md
```
